zh.lifeSummary: 當Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail於1340年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail40歲，母親Fynvola MacLeod20歲。他於1363年之前與Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年在英國蘇格蘭希倫德金泰爾享年35歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail于1340年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail40岁，母亲Fynvola MacLeod20岁。他于1363年之前与Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1375年在英国苏格兰希倫德金泰爾享年35岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Murdoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Muireadhach, meaning ‘lord’, but said to be a derivative of muir ‘sea’.

nameMeanings.name: Dubh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail was born in 1340, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail, was 40 and his mother, Fynvola MacLeod, was 20. He married Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom before 1363, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1375, in Kintail, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail est né en 1340, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Fynvola MacLeod, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom avant 1363, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1375, à Kintail, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de., Ross, Scotland: Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail 1340 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail 40 und seine Mutter Fynvola MacLeod 20. Er hat vor 1363 in Scotland Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Kintail, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail è nato il nel 1340 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Fynvola MacLeod, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom prima del 1363, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1375, nel Kintail, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintailが1340年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintailは40歳，母Fynvola MacLeodは20歳であった。1363年以前にスコットランドでLady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1375年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドキンティイルで35歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail(이)가 1340년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Fynvola MacLeod(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1363년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 킨테일에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail nasceu em 1340, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Fynvola MacLeod, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom antes 1363, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Murdoch Dubh Mackenzie 4th Lord of Kintail родился в 1340 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Fynvola MacLeod, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel MacAulay of Lochbroom перед 1363 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1375 г. в местности кинтеил, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Murió en 1375, en Kintail, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
